brand.desc: 80 Power. Fire. Physical. Lowers Enemy Defense by 1 stage. 10% Burn Chance

herd.name: Herd
herd.shortDesc: Swap all stat changes, entrance hazards, and status effects. Decrease the opponent’s speed by 3 stages and prevent switch-outs, escapes and pivots
herd.desc: Swap all stat changes, entrance hazards, and status effects. Decrease the opponent’s speed by 3 stages and prevent switch-outs, escapes and pivots

bustdown.shortDesc: Steals opponent pokemon’s item and stat boosts. Triggers all entrance hazards on this pokemon
bustdown.desc: Steals opponent pokemon’s item and stat boosts. Triggers all entrance hazards on this pokemon

guard.shortDesc: Switches out opponent, sets up Normal-Type Spikes
guard.desc: Switches out opponent, sets up Normal-Type Spikes

bury.desc: A 30% accurate instant KO attack. Normal Type.

unexpected.shortDesc: Lowers opponents speed and attack by 1 stage and switches out

hydrovortex.name: Hydro-Vortex
hydrovortex.shortDesc: Traps foe 4-5 turns, deals 1/8 HP each turn.
hydrovortex.desc: Traps the target for 4-5 turns and deals 1/8th max HP damage at end of each turn. While Mega Evolved, heals the user for that amount.

brineblade.name: Brine Blade
brineblade.shortDesc: Deals double damage if target is below 50% HP.
brineblade.desc: Physical Water slicing move. Deals double damage if the target is below 50% HP. 65 base power.

persistent.name: Persistent
persistent.shortDesc: Any attack that deals less than 20 damage, deals zero damage
persistent.desc: Any attack that deals less than 20 damage, deals zero damage

pounce.name: Pounce
pounce.shortDesc: 50/50 chance to attack first or last
pounce.desc: 50/50 chance to attack first or last

ricochet.name: Ricochet
ricochet.shortDesc: Reflects all: Bullet, Bomb, Sound, Blade and all Contact attacks and takes zero damage. Can be mitigated by abilities like Long Reach and Special Non-Contact moves like Flamethrower and Surf.
ricochet.desc: Reflects all: Bullet, Bomb, Sound, Blade and all Contact attacks and takes zero damage. Can be mitigated by abilities like Long Reach and Special Non-Contact moves like Flamethrower and Surf.

heartbreak.name: Heartbreak
heartbreak.shortDesc: Lowers Defense and Special Defense by 1 stage on Switch In. Ability activates the moment Mega Howound appears on the field.
heartbreak.desc: Lowers Defense and Special Defense by 1 stage on Switch In. Ability activates the moment Mega Howound appears on the field.

unexpected.shortDesc: 1/6 chance to instantly go first and instantly hit any move
unexpected.desc: 1/6 chance to instantly go first and instantly hit any move

battleready.shortDesc: 1.5x power multiplier to attacks that make contact
battleready.desc: 1.5x power multiplier to attacks that make contact

quickfoot.shortDesc: Attacks under 60 power are given +1 Priority
quickfoot.desc: Attacks under 60 power are given +1 Priority

haroldoftheend.name: Harold of the End:
haroldoftheend.shortDesc: If a move’s power is higher, not equal to, 90 pre-modifiers, then it gets increased to 150 pre-modifiers
haroldoftheend.desc: If a move’s power is higher, not equal to, 90 pre-modifiers, then it gets increased to 150 pre-modifiers

distillation.name: Distillation
distillation.desc: Defensive: Poison-type moves targeting this Pokemon become Water-type. Offensive: Poison-type moves used by this Pokemon become Water-type but keep original secondary effects.
